risk_summary: Project investments in multiple slums are pending due to remaining resettlements that have not been completed, causing delays in construction and upgrading activities.
evidence_quote: Two other investments (CDC and sports field) have started, while others are pending due to a few remaining resettlements.

risk_title: Slow progress on land regularization due to institutional priorities
risk_summary: Land regularization program progress has stalled since October 2023 as the Land Directorate has deprioritized the project to focus on internal data migration, blocking files and delaying land certificate delivery to beneficiaries.
evidence_quote: Progress has been slow and the files have been blocked by the Land Directorate since October, 2023 due to the priority it has given to the migration of INFOCAD data to the ArcGIS software.

risk_title: Refugee-led CSO participation gap in socioeconomic activities
risk_summary: Zero refugee-led CSOs have implemented SEDF-funded sub-projects despite a target of 60 by project closing, indicating potential exclusion or integration challenges for refugee populations in project activities.
evidence_quote: SEDF-funded sub-projects implemented by refugee-led CSO (Number) 0.00 Oct/2019 0.00 31-Oct-2023 0.00 31-Oct-2023 60.00 Dec/2026

risk_title: No vocational training completion certificates delivered to refugees
risk_summary: Despite targets of 200 completion certificates for refugees by project closing, zero certificates have been delivered, indicating stalled socioeconomic integration activities for refugee beneficiaries.
evidence_quote: Completion certificates for vocational training delivered to refugees (Number) 0.00 Sep/2019 0.00 31-Oct-2023 0.00 31-Oct-2023 200.00 Dec/2026

risk_title: Refugee village restructuring plans pending approval
risk_summary: Construction in refugee villages (Ali Addeh and Holl Holl) is delayed as restructuring plans are still under validation and awaiting approval, affecting refugee beneficiary access to improved services.
evidence_quote: Meanwhile, the program for investments in refugee villages is under validation, with construction expected to start in the spring.
